title: Technical tax information - Canada.ca
content:
## Technical tax information
This page provides links to technical information and publications related to the GST/HST, underused housing tax, luxury tax, income tax, excise taxes and other levies, excise duties, and the fuel charge.
- Excise duties technical information
- Excise taxes and other levies technical information
- Fuel charge technical information
- GST/HST technical information
- Underused housing tax technical information
- Luxury tax technical information
- Delegation of powers, duties, and functions
- Provincial income allocation newsletters
- Compliance Manuals and Policies
- Indexation adjustment for personal income tax and benefit amounts
To obtain consolidated statutes and regulations, go to the Justice Laws Website (Department of Justice) . The consolidated statutes and regulations are also available through commercial publishers, such as Carswell, CCH, CICA and Ernst & Young.
- GST/HST for business
- Excise taxes and duties, and other levies
- Provincial and territorial corporation tax

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
